_doc: Allowlist for yarn audit high/critical advisories. Every entry needs a reason and a review date. See SUPPLY-CHAIN-SECURITY.md §5.

_fields.ghsa: GitHub Security Advisory ID — for humans
_fields.reason: why the advisory is allowlisted — REQUIRED
_fields.review: YYYY-MM-DD — REQUIRED, expired prints warning but does not fail

entries.reason: Baselined at PR3 — transitive of @graphprotocol/graph-cli; latest stable graph-cli (0.98.1) does not refresh this advisory. Re-evaluate when graph-cli is bumped or a yarn resolution becomes feasible.

Baselined at PR3 — transitive of @graphprotocol/graph-cli; latest stable graph-cli (0.98.1) does not refresh this advisory. Re-evaluate when graph-cli is bumped or a yarn resolution becomes feasible.
